cases.name: cfstring_ascii_cstring_roundtrip
cases.description: ASCII C-string creation, UTF-8 export, UTF-16 export, equality, and hash observation.

cases.name: cfstring_utf8_cstring_roundtrip
cases.description: UTF-8 C-string creation and roundtrip observation for tested BMP and supplementary scalar content.

cases.name: cfstring_bytes_ascii_roundtrip
cases.description: ASCII bytes creation and full-range ASCII extraction observation.

cases.name: cfstring_utf16_characters_roundtrip
cases.description: UTF-16 character creation, UTF-8 export, and equality/hash observation.

cases.name: cfstring_copy_equality_hash
cases.description: CreateCopy ownership plus equal-string hash coherence observation.

cases.name: cfstring_bytes_invalid_utf8_rejected
cases.description: Malformed UTF-8 byte creation must fail safely without producing an object.
